query:
UPDATE daily_logs
SET dayComplete = 1,
    pointsAwarded = 10,
    cleanEating = 1,
    cleanEatingNote = COALESCE(NULLIF(cleanEatingNote, ''), 'Backdated technical correction: clean eating confirmed for the day.'),
    noAlcohol = 1,
    exerciseDone = 1,
    exerciseDuration = GREATEST(COALESCE(exerciseDuration, 0), 30),
    exerciseType = COALESCE(NULLIF(exerciseType, ''), 'Backdated technical proof upload'),
    exerciseProofUrl = COALESCE(NULLIF(exerciseProofUrl, ''), 'Backdated technical proof accepted by exception.'),
    reflectionDone = 1,
    reflectionText = COALESCE(NULLIF(reflectionText, ''), 'Backdated proof accepted after the Day 2 upload technical issue.'),
    readTeachDone = 1,
    readTeachText = COALESCE(NULLIF(readTeachText, ''), 'Backdated proof accepted after the Day 2 upload technical issue.'),
    trackedEverything = 1,
    submittedAt = COALESCE(submittedAt, '2026-05-07 23:00:00'),
    updatedAt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE participantId = 60011 AND dayNumber = 2;

UPDATE participants
SET currentStreak = 2,
    longestStreak = GREATEST(longestStreak, 2),
    totalPoints = 20,
    daysComplete = 2,
    livesRemaining = 4,
    updatedAt = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP
WHERE id = 60011;

SELECT id, displayName, currentStreak, longestStreak, totalPoints, daysComplete, livesRemaining, updatedAt FROM participants WHERE id = 60011;
SELECT dayNumber, dayComplete, pointsAwarded, submittedAt, updatedAt FROM daily_logs WHERE participantId = 60011 ORDER BY dayNumber;
